reason: Two milestone tasks (m9, m10) are blocked because PRD.md does not document shell_exec tool and describes code_exec as using AsyncFunction eval when the actual implementation uses quickjs-emscripten sandbox with Python support. These gaps prevent tasks from being completed and milestones from closing.
proposedChange: 1. Add shell_exec tool section to PRD.md documenting its interface and behavior. 2. Update code_exec section to reflect quickjs-emscripten sandbox implementation supporting both JS and Python, replacing the stale AsyncFunction eval description.
